title: sedum anglicum var. hudsonianum
intro: Sedum anglicum var. hudsonianum is a perennial succulent plant, commonly known as Hudson's sedum, which belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sedum anglicum var. hudsonianum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it can be used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
